projectDescription: A modern, lightweight, and powerful open-source wiki application built on Node.js with support for multiple editors, authentication providers, storage backends, and search engines.
keyFeatures: Multiple content editors: Markdown, WYSIWYG (CKEditor), AsciiDoc, API, Code, and Redirect
21+ authentication providers including OAuth2, OIDC, SAML, LDAP, and social login
11+ storage backends including Git, AWS S3, Azure Blob, Google Drive, Dropbox, and SFTP
9+ search engines including PostgreSQL full-text, Elasticsearch, Algolia, and Solr
Rich rendering pipeline: diagrams (Mermaid, PlantUML, Kroki), math (KaTeX, MathJax), syntax highlighting
Fine-grained group-based permissions with page-level access rules
GraphQL API with JWT authentication and API key support
High-availability mode for multi-instance deployments with PostgreSQL
Full page version history with diff and restore capabilities
Tags, page tree, and cross-page link tracking
publicApiSurface: pages.list - List all pages with filtering and ordering
pages.single / pages.singleByPath - Get a page by ID or path
pages.update - Update page content and metadata
pages.history - Get version history for a page
pages.restore - Restore a page to a previous version
authentication.login - Authenticate and get JWT token
authentication.createApiKey - Create a long-lived API key
users.list / users.single - List or get user details
groups.list / groups.single - List or get group details
assets.list / assets.get - Manage uploaded files and assets
